title: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
headline: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
subtitle: Take Down the Kortz Center
content:
Steal valuable artwork from the late Albert Crisp's personal collection on display in The Kortz Center Heist — a multi-stage robbery that can be completed with 1–4 players.

Meet Raf at your Mansion’s Art Studio and register as a Boss to use the Planning Board and carry out Prep work, including scoping out the building, stealing disguises, obtaining tools, and acquiring get away vehicles.

After stealing the Primary Target Painting, it can be sold for a profit or displayed in your Mansion.
